name: event_catalog_v1
description: adapterOS telemetry event catalog: structured training data for barrier coordination, adapter lifecycle, router decisions, and tick ledger events. Covers all canonical event types with full field schemas.

entries.notes: 700 examples across four subsystems: barrier (175), lifecycle (175), router (175), tick ledger (175). Each example maps a scenario description to the correct structured telemetry event.

provenance.review_notes: Canonical supervised dataset for structured telemetry event emission. All examples verified against schema definitions.

evaluation_gates: event_type field is dot-separated namespace matching the canonical catalog
component field is a valid adapterOS crate name
log_level is one of: trace, debug, info, warn, error
metadata contains all required fields for the event type
timestamp_us is a valid microsecond integer
correlation_id is present for request-scoped events
intent: Teach adapters to emit correct, fully-typed telemetry events for every operational state transition in adapterOS. Each scenario provides the triggering context; the target is the exact structured event that must be emitted.

subcategories.barrier: Multi-agent barrier coordination events from adapteros-deterministic-exec
subcategories.lifecycle: Adapter tier promotion, demotion, eviction, and crash recovery events
subcategories.router: K-sparse routing decisions, entropy violations, gate scores, and top-k selection
subcategories.tick_ledger: Ledger append, consistency verification, inconsistency detection, and chain audit events
